refined_caption: There is water visible on the hospital floor. The water appears to be in the middle of the floor.
complaint_description: I was walking down the hospital floor and noticed a large puddle of water in the middle of the hallway. This is a slipping hazard and could cause someone to fall. The hospital should clean this up immediately to ensure patient safety.
voice_text: There's water all over the floor in the hospital, it's really slippery and someone's gonna get hurt.
